raw:
## Completed
Implemented Tier 3 scorer calibration as a read-only, human-gated advisory loop:
- Pure calibration stats/proposal module.
- Thin ledger reader over `.pi/plans/*/log.jsonl`.
- Manual `foreman-calibration` command.
- Additive `gate1_awaiting.scoredAssumptions` payload.
- Headless calibration tests wired into the verify gate.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/calibration.ts` - pure calibration types, summarizer, proposal/report formatter, log-line extraction.
- `extensions/foreman/calibration-reader.ts` - thin fs reader for task ledgers.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - logs scored assumptions and registers `foreman-calibration`.
- `extensions/foreman/test/calibration_test.sh` - new headless tests.
- `extensions/foreman/test/scorer_test.sh` - updated grep seam for shared planner context.
- `extensions/foreman/test/teampacket_test.sh` - updated grep seam for shared planner context.
- `.pi/foreman.json` - verify gate now runs `calibration_test.sh`.
- `extensions/foreman/docs/INTERNALS.md` - documented calibration modules/manual-only boundary.

## How To Verify
```bash
grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/scorer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/calibration_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/approvalfriction_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/teampacket_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/docer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh
```

## Notes
Verify command passed. Calibration never auto-tunes `scorer.ts`, never writes `AGENTS.md`, and does not participate in DoD/gates.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)
